overview.name: Auth JWT Variations
overview.description:
This scenario verifies JWT authentication flow using variations file.
Test flow includes: 1. Load variation data from CSV file. 2. Send login request using variation credentials. 3. Verify login response = 200. 4. Extract token from response. 5. Send GET request to protected resource using extracted token. 6. Verify response = 200. 7. Validate response body using variation expected file. 8. Reset JWT auth state after each variation.
This scenario validates: - Variation value injection into request body - Variation value injection into expected files - JWT login flow with multiple data sets - Protected resource access for each variation

var.comment: Step 4. Extract JWT token from login response
var.name: token

http.comment: Step 5-7. Access protected resource using JWT token
Step 8. Reset JWT auth state after variation
